backend.changelog: Generating outputs for very large assemblies no longer stops after 30 minutes. The time limit now scales with the number of components, so a long but healthy run finishes instead of being cut off with a false "Done". Use the Stop button to cancel at any time.

cadBridge.changelog: Fixes a tray-icon crash that could take the agent offline after long uptime (e.g. when right-clicking the tray icon). Adds diagnostic logging for large-assembly Generate performance and SolidWorks resource usage (no change to generated outputs). Pairs with backend 1.1.25.
